subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, dust-filmed at a work site, supports the signal head casting a hard shadow while the lit red lamp burns through the haze, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex bright but filmed with fine construction dust; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood filmed with drifting construction dust under the harsh sun
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A construction-zone intersection under bright clear midday summer sun with dust hanging in the air. The patched, worn asphalt bears a painted white stop line and lane markings amid temporary barriers, cones and idle equipment. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. Harsh sun cuts through drifting dust, casting hard shadows, while the red lamp burns clearly through the haze.

lighting.conditions: Bright harsh midday summer sun with drifting construction dust
lighting.direction: Sun high overhead, casting short hard shadows softened where dust drifts
lighting.shadows: Short, hard shadows of the post, signal head and balloons, softly diffused where dust passes
lighting.illumination_effect: Harsh dusty midday light under which the illuminated red lamp burns clearly through the haze and balloon colors are bright but dust-filmed

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the patched road and barriers leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the burning red lamp amid dust
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm dusty palette of tan dust haze, patched grey asphalt, safety-orange barriers, with the red lamp and balloons as saturated accents
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Busy, gritty, industrious, faintly whimsical from the incongruous festive balloons
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings, lines of cones and barriers, drifting dust, and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, burning red lamp, and overlapping green balloon through drifting dust

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the patched construction-zone road under harsh dusty sun, approaching the intersection where the red light burns through the haze and balloons sway on the post amid barriers.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the stop line among cones and barriers; the green balloon clearly overlaps the red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the dust-filmed balloons continue to sway.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the construction-zone intersection under harsh dusty midday sun; the single traffic light displays a steady red through drifting dust, with party balloons tied to the post swaying amid barriers.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the traffic light and balloons closer past cones; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the painted stop line on patched worn asphalt among barriers; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping dust-filmed balloon is clearly framed.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; dust-filmed balloons continue to sway.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons and drifting dust move.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a patched construction-zone road under harsh dusty midday sun toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light burning steady red through the haze, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the gusty air. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the painted stop line amid barriers. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the dust-filmed balloons still bobbing under hard midday shadows.
audio_description: Ambient construction-zone sounds: idling engines, distant beeping and clanks, gusts stirring dust, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Light rustle of balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
